name: Medical Claim
description: Clip contains language that could be interpreted as medical diagnosis, treatment recommendation, or health promise.
disclaimer: Results may vary. Consult a qualified medical professional before starting any treatment.

name: Financial Advice
description: Clip contains specific investment recommendations or guaranteed return promises.
disclaimer: This is not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

name: Copyrighted Music
description: Clip contains identifiable copyrighted music in the audio track.
notes: Audio fingerprinting required for accurate detection. Flag manually for music category clips.

name: Sports / Broadcast Rights
description: Clip may contain footage from a professional sports broadcast.
notes: Professional sports footage may be DMCA-protected. Flag for all sports category clips.

name: Explicit Language
description: Clip contains profanity or explicit language that may limit platform distribution.
notes: Apply censored caption replacement. Warn creator about reduced distribution reach.

name: Competitor Platform Watermark
description: Clip contains a visible watermark from a competing platform (TikTok, Instagram, etc.).
notes: Instagram and TikTok suppress cross-platform watermarked content. Crop or blur watermark before posting.
